---
title: "Groups"
description: "Browse public free functions."
toc-expand: true
body-classes: "cpp-api-page cpp-api-groups-page"
---

::: {.cpp-api-function-index}
::: {.cpp-api-function-index-group}
[Scene I/O]{.cpp-api-function-index-label}

[`ChooseSceneInputs`](#choose-scene-inputs) · [`LoadScene`](#load-scene)
:::

::: {.cpp-api-function-index-group}
[GPS Generation]{.cpp-api-function-index-label}

[`GenerateGpsSamplesFromPose`](#generate-gps-samples-from-pose)
:::

::: {.cpp-api-function-index-group}
[Initialization]{.cpp-api-function-index-label}

[`ComputeStartupInitialization`](#compute-startup-initialization)
:::
:::

## Scene I/O {#scene-io}

Selecting input files and loading scene data.

### `ChooseSceneInputs` {#choose-scene-inputs}

Select the pose and IMU files for the run.

#### Signature

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_io.hpp#L17">source</a></div>

```cpp
SceneInputs ChooseSceneInputs();
```
:::

#### Output

The chosen input file pair.

### `LoadScene` {#load-scene}

Load the selected pose and IMU streams.

#### Signature

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_io.hpp#L28">source</a></div>

```cpp
LoadedScene LoadScene(const SceneInputs& scene_inputs);
```
:::

#### Inputs

- `scene_inputs`: Selected pose and IMU file paths.

#### Output

Loaded pose and IMU samples.

#### Non-obvious behavior

If exactly one final pose sample occurs after the last IMU sample, it is
dropped during load.

## GPS Generation {#gps-generation}

Generate synthetic GPS samples from pose samples.

### `GenerateGpsSamplesFromPose` {#generate-gps-samples-from-pose}

Generate synthetic GPS samples from the loaded pose stream.

#### Signature

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/gps_generation.hpp#L20">source</a></div>

```cpp
std::vector<GpsSample> GenerateGpsSamplesFromPose(
    const std::vector<PoseSample>& pose_samples);
```
:::

#### Inputs

- `pose_samples`: Loaded pose samples.

#### Output

Generated GPS samples.

## Initialization {#initialization}

Compute the startup state used to begin live filtering.

### `ComputeStartupInitialization` {#compute-startup-initialization}

Compute the startup initialization from IMU and GPS samples.

#### Signature

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/initialization.hpp#L22">source</a></div>

```cpp
std::optional<StartupInitialization> ComputeStartupInitialization(
    const std::vector<ImuSample>& imu_samples,
    const std::vector<GpsSample>& gps_samples);
```
:::

#### Inputs

- `imu_samples`: Loaded IMU samples.
- `gps_samples`: Generated GPS samples.

#### Output

The startup initialization, if one can be computed.
